name: Roman Egg and Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the eggs, bread crumbs, cheese, and zest in a bowl.
2. Beat until thoroughly blended.
3. Bring the bouillon to a boil.
4. Slowly pour the boiling bouillon into the egg mixture while stirring continuously.
5. Continue stirring until just up to a simmer.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
